mapper.select: SELECT JBGD_CD , JBGD_NM , APPR_ATRZ_YN , CRT_DT , USE_YN FROM JOB_GRADE WHERE COALESCE(USE_YN, 'Y') = 'Y' ORDER BY JBGD_NM
SELECT JBGD_CD , JBGD_NM , APPR_ATRZ_YN , CRT_DT , USE_YN FROM JOB_GRADE WHERE JBGD_CD = #{jbgdCd}
SELECT JBGD_CD , JBGD_NM , APPR_ATRZ_YN , CRT_DT , USE_YN FROM JOB_GRADE WHERE UPPER(TRIM(JBGD_NM)) = UPPER(TRIM(#{jbgdNm})) FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
